brand.name: Robn
brand.description: Robn is a cloud-based software platform built for Australian businesses. Based in Western Sydney, we give small and medium-sized teams the tools they need to work smarter — without the complexity.

hero.headline: Software that works as hard as you do.
hero.subhead: Robn gives Australian businesses a smarter way to manage their work — simple to set up, easy to use, and built to grow with you.

sections.title: Everything you need, nothing you don't.
sections.body: Robn is designed around the way real businesses operate — not the other way around. Here's what you get out of the box.

items.title: Built for Australian businesses
items.body: Robn is developed with local teams in mind. No confusing US-centric defaults, no unnecessary overhead — just a platform that fits the way you work.

items.title: Your data, your control
items.body: Your information stays yours. Robn gives you full visibility and control over your data, with secure cloud storage you can rely on.

items.title: Streamline your workflow
items.body: Cut the back-and-forth and get more done. Robn brings your tools and processes together in one clean, intuitive platform.

items.title: Simple, powerful, reliable
items.body: We sweat the details so you don't have to. Robn is built to be fast, dependable, and genuinely straightforward to use every day.

sections.title: Based in Western Sydney. Built for the whole country.
sections.body: Robn is a Liverpool-based SaaS business on a straightforward mission: give Australian teams software that actually makes their day easier. We're not chasing buzzwords or trying to reinvent the wheel — we're focused on building something solid, practical, and worth your time. Whether you're a small team just getting started or a growing business looking to tighten things up, Robn is designed to meet you where you are.

sections.title: What Robn offers
sections.body: A cloud-based platform designed to help your business run more smoothly — accessible anywhere, on any device.

items.title: Cloud-based platform
items.body: Access everything you need from your browser or device, with nothing to install and no maintenance headaches.

items.title: SaaS subscription
items.body: One straightforward subscription. No lock-in contracts, no surprise fees — just the software you need at a predictable price.

items.title: Ongoing updates
items.body: Robn gets better over time. New features and improvements are rolled out regularly, included as part of your subscription.

items.title: A breath of fresh air
items.body: "We'd tried a few different platforms before landing on Robn. The difference is night and day — it's clean, it's quick, and our team actually uses it." — Small business owner, Western Sydney

items.title: Finally, software that makes sense
items.body: "Setup took us less than a day. Everything just worked the way we expected it to. Honestly refreshing." — Operations manager, NSW

sections.title: Ready to give Robn a go?
sections.body: Get in touch and we'll walk you through what Robn can do for your business. No hard sell, no jargon — just a straightforward conversation.

footer.blurb: Robn — cloud software built for Australian businesses. Simple, powerful, reliable. Based in Liverpool, NSW.
